fields.name: blacklistedInEUAllowed
fields.description: This flag enable/disable filtering of blacklisted airline by EU. The list of the banned airlines is published in the Official Journal of the European Union, where they are included as annexes A and B to the Commission Regulation. The blacklist of an airline can concern all its flights or some specific aircraft types pertaining to the airline

fields.name: excludedCarrierCodes
fields.description: This option ensures that the system will only consider these airlines.

fields.name: includedCarrierCodes
fields.description: This option ensures that the system will only consider these airlines.
